cta.sub: Got an idea? We'll turn it into a digital product that exceeds your expectations.

hero.desc: We turn your ideas into digital products that wow your audience and deliver real results — with clean code, smart design, and on-time delivery.

about.p1: We're a passionate team of developers and designers who believe that great digital products don't happen by accident — they're built with intention, craft, and honest communication.
about.p2c: — we help businesses of all sizes take control of their digital presence.

services.desc: Everything you need to bring your digital product to life — designed and engineered with care.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Fast, responsive websites and web apps built with modern technologies that scale with your business goals.

uiux.title: UI / UX Design
uiux.desc: Beautiful, user-centered interfaces that convert visitors into customers and keep them coming back for more.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.desc: Robust server-side solutions, databases, and API integrations that power your digital products reliably.

mobile.title: Mobile App Services
mobile.desc: End-to-end development of powerful and user-friendly mobile applications for iOS and Android.

perf.title: Performance Tuning
perf.desc: Speed matters. We audit, optimize, and ensure every millisecond counts for your user experience and SEO.

support.title: Maintenance & Support
support.desc: We don't disappear after launch. Ongoing support, updates, and monitoring keep your product running smoothly.

testimonials.soonDesc: We'll be publishing client reviews and amazing stories here soon. Stay tuned for authentic testimonials!

contact.desc: Code Your Agency. Reach out — we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a clear plan and honest pricing.

values.speedDesc: We move fast — but never at the cost of quality. Every line of code matters.
values.transparencyDesc: No fluff, no hidden costs. You always know where your project stands.
values.partnersDesc: We treat your business like it's ours. Your win is our win.
values.scaleDesc: We architect with growth in mind. What we build today handles tomorrow.

hero.sub: Codeyaa is a brand-new software studio with bold ambitions. We're a startup born to move fast, craft quality, and help you win. Size doesn't scare us — it keeps us sharp. Let's grow together.

story.p1part2: , right in the heart of the digital era's next wave. We believe that startups—like yours—deserve tech partners who are as fast, motivated, and hungry as they are.
story.p2: We're a new team, but we move with the urgency and imagination that modern business demands. Side by side, we’ll turn scrappy beginnings into amazing launches, products, and results.
story.p3: If you want a team that's all-in on your vision, driven for impact, and unrestrained by "the old ways" — let’s make something powerful together.
story.quote: "We're a startup just like you — ready to build the future, one line at a time."
story.author: — The Codeyaa Team
